_description: Ratchet — floor/max values enforced by check-ratchet.js in CI.

testCount.note: v7.5.5 floor — 66 new tests vs v7.5.4 (43 base + 15 hardening + 4 verb-first + 4 status-report). Expected: 6021 actual on Linux. Floor = min - 7 safety margin.

fitnessScore.note: v7.6.0: floor lowered 127 → 124 to reflect Track A splits (UI dual-path, CommandHandlersInstall 3-file split, CommandHandlersOpen platform-resolver split + dedup). Score drop is intentional: smaller, single-purpose files trade off against the binary File-Size-Guard count metric. Audit §3.5 (v7.6.0 audit) confirmed the structural health is unchanged. v7.4.5 large-file watch (PromptBuilderSections, EpisodicMemory, GoalDriver, AgentLoop, GoalStack) is still active — see AUDIT-BACKLOG.md for plans. v7.6+ Track A #4 (ModelBridge._prepareCallContext extract) should bring ModelBridge back under 700 LOC.

schemaMismatches.note: scan-schemas.js must report 0. Runtime event payloads must match declared schemas.

schemaMissing.note: audit-schemas.js missing check — catalog entries without schema registrations. v7.6.0 audit §3.2: install:completed and selfmod:language-guard-blocked schemas added in this release.

schemaOrphan.note: audit-schemas.js orphan check — schemas without catalog entries.

brokenLinks.note: Internal docs/ links must all resolve.
